Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 14), dh-sequence-single-binary, dh-sequence-python3, pybuild-plugin-pyproject, python3-all, python3-audioop-lts, python3-av, python3-bs4, python3-cairo, python3-click, python3-cloup, python3-colour, python3-decorator, python3-hatchling, python3-isosurfaces, python3-manimpango, python3-mapbox-earcut, python3-moderngl, python3-moderngl-window, python3-networkx, python3-numpy, python3-pillow, python3-pydub, python3-pygments, python3-pytest <!nocheck>, python3-pytest-cov <!nocheck>, python3-pytest-xdist <!nocheck>, python3-rich, python3-scipy, python3-screeninfo, python3-skia-pathops, python3-srt, python3-svgelements, python3-tqdm, python3-typing-extensions, python3-watchdog, xauth <!nocheck>, xvfb <!nocheck>
Description: Animation engine for explanatory math videos Manim is used to create precise animations programmatically, as demonstrated in the videos of 3Blue1Brown. All animations are written as Python code and rendered with the manim CLI tool. . This is the Commmunity Edition of manim, which is a better maintained fork of Grant Sanderson's manim package. You will want this version unless you plan to re-render some old 3Blue1Brown Youtube videos from Grant's source code.
